description: PIEmaker V.4 paper-to-code alignment matrix. Each entry maps a Gordon-Moakler-Zettelmeyer (NBER w35044, April 2026) artifact (equation, figure, table, or methodological claim) to the code location that implements it, with a research-alignment status.

statuses.implemented: Exact paper definition implemented and exercised in tests.
statuses.approximated: Implementation in place but diverges from paper in a documented way (proxy weights, residual ceiling, smaller bootstrap, etc.). V.4 closes these.

entries.title: Incremental conversions per dollar (ICPD)
entries.definition: ICPD = IC / cost; do NOT model CPIC directly

entries.title: Feature ablation R² across specs Pre / +Yt / +LCC-7D / Full / Raw-LCC
entries.gap: Uses 25% train/test split + no error bars. V.4 rebuilds on OOF with 1000-bootstrap CI per spec.

entries.title: Weighted out-of-fold R-squared
model_card_criteria: headline R² computed from OOF predictions, not full-data refit

entries.title: R² ceiling from label noise (RCT estimation error in ATT)
model_card_criteria: ceiling derived from per-RCT ATT standard errors, not model residual variance

entries.title: 10-fold cross-validation in paper mode
model_card_criteria: n_splits == 10 in paper mode (smaller pools may reduce; reported in model card)

entries.title: Hold-out-one-level extrapolation penalty per segmentation variable
entries.gap: Returns medians only. V.4 stores full within / extrapolation R² distributions.

entries.title: Decision disagreement at threshold t
entries.definition: D(t) = mean(1{ICPD <= t and pred > t} + 1{ICPD > t and pred <= t})

entries.title: Disagreement curves over 0.5x - 1.5x of segment median ICPD; PIE vs Raw LCC-7D
LCC calibration by segment: bias ratio, OLS slope, Spearman rho, raw LCC R²
entries.gap: Portfolio-wide only. V.4 extends with segment_var parameter.

entries.title: Existing-advertiser vs new-advertiser CV; bootstrap over advertisers
Pre/post feature partition with advertiser_id, advertiser_size, campaign_year
model_card_criteria: campaign_year, advertiser_size, advertiser_id present in X_pre

entries.title: Mechanical-correlation defense: deterministic sample-split when user-level data is available
